SSH sandbox tar upload follows symlinks, enabling arbitrary file write on remote host

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: high
- Assessment: Real in shipped v2026.3.28: SSH sandbox tar upload lacked pre-upload symlink escape rejection until 3d5af14984 on 2026-03-31; maintainers already accepted it and the fix is unreleased.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `3d5af14984ac1976c747a8e11581d697bd0829dc` — 2026-03-31T19:56:45+09:00

OpenClaw thanks @AntAISecurityLab for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00533, "percentile": 0.40707}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-02T21:23:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41364"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-02T21:23:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/3d5af14984ac1976c747a8e11581d697bd0829dc", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41364", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-file-write-via-symlink-following-in-ssh-sandbox-tar-upload", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: SSH sandbox tar upload follows symlinks, enabling arbitrary file write on remote host", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T19:11:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv94-qvg8-xqpw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
